Bash(CHROME_WS_PORT=9222 /Users/alwaysking/.claude/plugins/cache/superpowers-marketplace/superpowers-chrome/1.12.0/skills/browsing/chrome-ws eval 2 '\(\(\) => { const el = document.querySelector\("[class*=notion-selectable] h1, [class*=notion-selectable] [contenteditable]"\); if\(!el\) { const all = document.querySelectorAll\("h1, [contenteditable]"\); return "Found " + all.length + " elements: " + Array.from\(all\).slice\(0,3\).map\(e => e.tagName + "." + \(e.className || ""\).slice\(0,40\)\).join\(", "\); } return getComputedStyle\(el\).fontSize + "|" + getComputedStyle\(el\).lineHeight + "|" + getComputedStyle\(el\).fontWeight; }\)\(\)')
